ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "webname" TEXT /* Web name or code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "world_rank" INTEGER /* World ranking of the country based on the score */,
  "region_rank" INTEGER /* Regional ranking of the country based on the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Overall score of the country */,
  "population_millions" REAL /* Population of the country in millions */,
  "gdp_billions_ppp" REAL /* GDP of the country in billions (PPP) */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate of the country */,
  "five_year_gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* 5-year GDP growth rate of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita_ppp" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country (PPP) */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country */,
  "fdi_inflow_millions" REAL /* Foreign Direct Investment inflow in millions */,
  "public_debt_percent_of_gdp" REAL /* Public debt as a percentage of GDP */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "property_rights" REAL /* Score for property rights */,
  "judicial_effectiveness" REAL /* Score for judicial effectiveness */,
  "government_integrity" REAL /* Score for government integrity */,
  "economic_freedom" REAL /* Score for economic freedom */,
  "corruption_perception_index" REAL /* Score for corruption perception index */,
  "press_freedom_index" REAL /* Score for press freedom index */,
  "human_development_index" REAL /* Score for human development index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "population_millions" REAL /* Population of the country in millions */,
  "urban_population_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "rural_population_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in rural areas */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate of the country */,
  "life_expectancy_at_birth" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_data" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "gdp_billions_ppp" REAL /* GDP of the country in billions (PPP) */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate of the country */,
  "five_year_gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* 5-year GDP growth rate of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita_ppp" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country (PPP) */,
  "gdp_sector_composition" TEXT /* Sector composition of the country's GDP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country */,
  "labor_force_participation_rate" REAL /* Labor force participation rate of the country */,
  "youth_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Youth unemployment rate of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_data" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "fdi_inflow_millions" REAL /* Foreign Direct Investment inflow in millions */,
  "public_debt_percent_of_gdp" REAL /* Public debt as a percentage of GDP */,
  "foreign_exchange_reserves_billions" REAL /* Foreign exchange reserves in billions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "gdp_growth_rate_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted GDP growth rate */,
  "inflation_rate_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted inflation rate */,
  "unemployment_rate_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted unemployment rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "partner_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the partner country */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., trade, diplomacy, conflict) */,
  "interaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_interactions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_interactions_partner_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
